message:
fix(search,sources): improve hash encoding, memory tracking, score fallback, and SSH keepalive

Canonicalize (search/canonicalize.rs):
- Replace the manual per-byte format!("{b:02x}") hex encoding in
  content_hash_hex() with hex::encode(). This is both clearer and
  avoids N small string allocations for each byte — hex::encode writes
  directly into a single pre-allocated String.

Query cache (search/query.rs):
- Include workspace_original, source_id, origin_kind, and origin_host
  in CachedHit::estimated_size(). These fields were added to SearchHit
  after the cache sizing was written, causing the LRU cache to
  undercount memory usage and potentially hold more entries than the
  configured limit.

Two-tier search (search/two_tier_search.rs):
- Fix the fallback score when a fast-search result has no corresponding
  quality-search entry. Previously it fell back to fast.score (the raw
  unnormalized score), which could be on a completely different scale
  than the normalized blended scores, causing incorrect ranking. Now
  falls back to 0.0, which correctly ranks unconfirmed fast results
  below quality-confirmed ones.

SSH sources (sources/mod.rs):
- Add ServerAliveInterval=15 and ServerAliveCountMax=3 to both
  strict_ssh_cli_tokens() and strict_ssh_command_for_rsync(). This
  sends keepalive probes every 15 seconds and disconnects after 3
  missed responses (45s), preventing rsync syncs from hanging
  indefinitely on network interruptions or unresponsive remote hosts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
